mapper.sql: id, customer_id, contact_id, follow_type, subject, content, direction, status, start_time, end_time, duration_minutes, location, participants_json, outcome, next_step, next_follow_date, sentiment, importance, related_inquiry_id, related_order_id, related_contract_id, email_message_id, attachments_json, created_by, created_time, updated_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT fur.id, fur.customer_id as customerId, c.company_name as companyName, fur.follow_type as followType, fur.subject, fur.content, fur.direction, fur.status, fur.start_time as startTime, fur.duration_minutes as durationMinutes, fur.outcome, fur.next_step as nextStep, fur.next_follow_date as nextFollowDate, fur.sentiment, fur.importance, u.real_name as creatorName, fur.created_time as createdTime FROM crm_follow_up_record fur LEFT JOIN crm_customer c ON fur.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON fur.created_by = u.id WHERE fur.customer_id = #{customerId} AND fur.deleted = 0 ORDER BY fur.start_time DESC
SELECT follow_type as followType, COUNT(*) as count FROM crm_follow_up_record WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY follow_type ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT fur.id, fur.customer_id as customerId, c.company_name as companyName, fur.follow_type as followType, fur.subject, fur.next_follow_date as nextFollowDate, fur.importance, DATEDIFF(fur.next_follow_date, CURDATE()) as daysUntilDue FROM crm_follow_up_record fur LEFT JOIN crm_customer c ON fur.customer_id = c.id WHERE fur.created_by = #{userId} AND fur.status = 'planned' AND fur.deleted = 0 AND fur.next_follow_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY fur.next_follow_date ASC
